query: heavy lens flare sun glare washout veil photograph haze
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: A lighthouse tower with visible horizontal banding emits a bright light with radiating starburst rays against a vivid orange sky. In the upper right, a large glowing celestial body appears behind thin horizontal cloud bands. Dark silhouettes of trees and low structures line the bottom horizon.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A lighthouse tower with visible horizontal banding stands beneath a heavy, low-contrast orange sky that feels suffocating and evokes atmospheric distress. Its lantern room emits an extremely blown-out light with harsh starburst rays, while a celestial body in the upper right is reduced to an overexposed glow behind thin clouds. The extreme exposure crushes the foreground into opaque black silhouette, leaving the scene with weak tonal separation and an oppressive, melancholic mood.
